summary: Tested Phase 1+2 BIQc features: Navigation (BIQc Legal sidebar), tier gate components (EnterpriseContactGate, UpgradeCardsGate), SoundBoard enhancements, MarketPage reorganization, ForensicReportCard in Reports, and 30-day Marketing Intel timer. Found and fixed critical routing bugs where TierGate was blocking EnterpriseContactGate and UpgradeCardsGate from rendering.

minor.issue: Slow response (30+ seconds before returning 403/200). Causes Marketing Intel page spinner to hang. Axios timeout 30s is too short for slow responses - page shows spinner until timeout. Not a blocker since .finally() correctly stops loading.

ui_bugs.issue: ForensicReportCard (with 'FREE TIER: 1/30 DAYS' badge) is inside /reports which requires 'starter' tier. Free users clicking 'Go to Governance Reports' from MarketPage get redirected to /subscribe instead of seeing ForensicReportCard. tierResolver '/reports': 'starter' should be changed to 'free' OR TierGate removed from /reports route with UpgradeCardsGate added inside for premium sections.

issues: Executive Brief (data-testid='brief-section') and Focus section not visible for test user due to no snapshot/calibration data - expected behavior, not a bug

bugs_fixed.fix: Removed TierGate from /revenue and /operations routes - EnterpriseContactGate inside RevenuePage/OperationsPage handles access control internally. Without this fix, free users were redirected to /subscribe instead of seeing the contact form.

Removed TierGate from /automations route - UpgradeCardsGate inside AutomationsPageAuth handles access control. Without this fix, free users were redirected to /subscribe instead of seeing the 4 pricing tier cards.

test_results.3_biqc_legal_sidebar: PASS - Collapsible 'BIQC LEGAL' section visible at bottom of sidebar
test_results.4_legal_6_items: PASS - All 6 items visible when expanded: BIQc AI Learning Guarantee, Security & Infrastructure, Trust Centre, Data Processing Agreement, Privacy Policy, Terms & Conditions
test_results.5_enterprise_contact_gate_revenue: PASS (after App.js fix) - Free user sees EnterpriseContactGate form on /revenue
test_results.6_form_fields: PASS - Full Name, Business Name, Email Address, Mobile/Phone fields all present
test_results.7_calendar_widget: PASS - 'Preferred Callback Time' dropdown with 'Select a date and time' present
test_results.8_description_textarea: PASS - 'What Intelligence Are You Looking For?' textarea present (500 char limit)
test_results.9_upgrade_cards_automations: PASS (after App.js fix) - 4 pricing tier cards: Foundation, Performance, Growth, Enterprise
test_results.10_plan_card_navigates: PASS - Clicking 'Get Started' on Foundation plan navigates to /subscribe?plan=starter
test_results.11_soundboard_buttons: PASS - 'Complete Calibration' (Zap, orange) and 'Run Exposure Scan' (Eye, blue) at top of SoundBoard
test_results.12_soundboard_welcome: PASS - Welcome message 'Welcome to SoundBoard — your AI thinking partner.' shown on first visit (localStorage cleared)
test_results.13_market_executive_brief: CONDITIONAL - Brief section code in correct position but doesn't render without snapshot data (user has no integrations)
test_results.14_market_no_forensic_cards: PASS - No ForensicCalibrationCard/EngagementScanCard. Replaced with 'Forensic Reports' redirect panel pointing to /reports
test_results.15_reports_forensic_card: FAIL - /reports redirects free users to /subscribe due to tierResolver '/reports':'starter'. ForensicReportCard with 'FREE TIER: 1/30 DAYS' never shown.
test_results.16_marketing_intel_30day: PASS - 'Free tier: 1 scan per 30 days' badge visible in 'Run Your First Benchmark' section after 30s wait for API

action_items: HIGH: Fix /reports route access - change tierResolver '/reports': 'starter' to '/reports': 'free' (or remove TierGate from App.js /reports route and add UpgradeCardsGate inside ReportsPage for premium sections). Currently free users clicking 'Go to Governance Reports' from MarketPage get bounced to /subscribe, blocking ForensicReportCard.
LOW: Marketing Intel page loads slowly (30+ seconds) because /api/marketing/benchmark/latest is slow/returning 403. Consider adding a shorter timeout or error state for this specific endpoint.
INFO: SoundBoard welcome message correctly works for brand-new users (isFirstVisit=true AND no prior conversations). Test1234 user sees it in fresh browser session.
critical_code_review_comments: App.js: After removing TierGate from /revenue, /operations, /automations - these routes now rely entirely on internal gate components (EnterpriseContactGate, UpgradeCardsGate). Ensure the gate components correctly handle all tier edge cases.
MarketingIntelPage: The /api/marketing/benchmark/latest endpoint returns 403 for some requests. The catch handler is empty which silently fails - consider adding error state UI.

ReportsPage: ForensicReportCard uses localStorage for tracking report dates (CALIB_REPORT_KEY, SCAN_REPORT_KEY). These dates reset on new browser/device which may not match actual server-side report generation state.
ROUTE_ACCESS: '/reports' still maps to 'starter' in tierResolver.js but ForensicReportCard is designed for free tier. Either change tier mapping or refactor report access architecture.

success_rate.frontend: 87% (14/16 tests pass, 1 requires E1 fix for /reports access, 1 conditional on data)

test_credentials.note: Account has no integrations/calibration data - some sections show empty states

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1+2 testing done. App.js was fixed to remove TierGate from /revenue, /operations, /automations routes (gate components handle internally). Main remaining issue: /reports still blocks free users via TierGate - ForensicReportCard never shown to free users. EnterpriseContactGate and UpgradeCardsGate work correctly after App.js fix. BIQc Legal sidebar section works. SoundBoard welcome message and Calibration/Scan buttons work. Marketing Intel 30-day badge works (takes ~30s for API). Market page Forensic Reports redirect works.

rca_of_issues.enterprise_contact_gate_blocked: Root Cause: App.js had TierGate wrapping /revenue and /operations routes. TierGate.js checks ROUTE_ACCESS which maps '/revenue' to 'enterprise'. Free users (rank=0) don't satisfy enterprise (rank=3), so TierGate redirects to /subscribe?from=%2Frevenue before RevenuePage (and EnterpriseContactGate inside it) ever renders. Fix: Remove TierGate from these routes since internal gate components handle the access.
rca_of_issues.upgrade_cards_gate_blocked: Root Cause: Same pattern - App.js had TierGate wrapping /automations. TierGate checks ROUTE_ACCESS which maps '/automations' to 'starter'. Free users redirect to /subscribe before AutomationsPageAuth (with UpgradeCardsGate inside) renders. Fix: Remove TierGate from /automations route.
rca_of_issues.reports_free_tier_blocked: Root Cause: tierResolver.js maps '/reports' to 'starter'. TierGate in App.js blocks free users from /reports. ForensicReportCard inside ReportsPage (with 'FREE TIER: 1/30 DAYS' badge) is never shown to free users. MarketPage 'Go to Governance Reports' button is a dead-end for free users. Mitigation: Change '/reports': 'starter' to '/reports': 'free' in tierResolver.js OR remove TierGate from /reports App.js route and gate premium sections internally.
